title: Rocks, Cliffs, and Scene Framing

video.note: Students build a castle environment in Unreal Engine while recording daily screen/camera evidence for a making-of documentary.

learningTarget: I can use rocks, cliffs, or terrain props to frame the castle environment and document how framing guides the viewer.

bellRinger.prompt: How can foreground or background objects guide attention in a scene?

vocabulary.definition: A dated record of what was built, what was captured, what changed, and what needs to happen next.
Video captured from the computer screen to show workflow, testing, or before/after changes.
Camera or screen-recorded evidence that shows how a project was made.
Supporting footage that helps explain a process, place, detail, or action.
The Q3 Unreal scene students build, refine, walk through, and document.

slides.title: Q3 Lesson 10 - Rocks, Cliffs, and Scene Framing

assignment.title: Rocks, Cliffs, and Framing Pass
evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing rocks, cliffs, or terrain framing.
Daily documentary clip showing a framing decision.

exitTicket: What framing element did you capture today, and how does it guide the viewer?
